meta.title: Full-Stack & AI Engineer — Portfolio
meta.description: Senior full-stack and AI engineer based in Japan, building production systems for clients worldwide. Available for freelance projects.

hero.subtitleJa: 東京から世界へ、現場で動くプロダクトを。
hero.lead: I help startups and global teams ship AI-powered products — from architecture and infra to frontend polish. Ten years of senior-level experience across Japan and abroad.
